test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient focused coverage: FTacticalStationOrbitalMovementTest verifies single pending occupancy, relocation, invalid-click non-mutation, relocated-hex orbit initialization, and unchanged non-station placement flow; tactical suite rerun passed with OK (129 tests).
documentation_accuracy_summary: doc/UsersGuide.md accurately describes pre-orbit station relocation before orbital direction finalization without overstating the change, and no extra documentation file was needed.
assumptions: Compared tester/documenter-stage changes against station-placement-implementer-20260508 as directed, with master used only as broader repository context.

Although the plan's initial documentation-impact note said no documentation update was expected, the existing UsersGuide station-setup section was the narrowest accurate place to record the shipped relocation behavior.
